title: Shares and similar investments
description: Find out what can trigger a CGT event, such as selling shares or receiving certain distributions.
keywords: Capital gains tax shares, capital gains tax units

child_links.description: How to identify which shares you have sold, when you acquired them, and the records you need.

child_links.description: Work out if you are investing or trading in shares, and the difference it makes to your tax.

child_links.title: Share buy-backs

child_links.title: Demergers CGT rollover for shareholders and unit holders

child_links.title: Trust non-assessable payments (CGT event E4)
child_links.description: Unit trusts often make non-assessable payments to unit holder.
